document_text:
Project: DogeMoon
Chain: Solana
Category: Memecoin

Overview
DogeMoon is the next big dog coin! To the moon!

Tokenomics
Ticker: DMOON
Supply: 1,000,000,000,000
Team keeps 45% for marketing and development. Liquidity is currently unlocked but we promise to lock it later. The contract has a mint function so we can adjust supply if needed.

Security
We are currently Unaudited but will get one soon. The contract is closed source to protect our trade secrets. The dev team controls the main admin key.
